tools.name: get_company_facts
tools.description: Get the verified fact record for a company by domain from the Grounded AEO catalog. Returns the published (approved) facts with verification state and confidence — the data an AI agent should ground answers about this business on.

tools.name: get_fact
tools.description: Get a single verified fact for a company by domain and fact key (e.g. "tagline", "description").

tools.name: get_llms_txt
tools.description: Get the auto-generated llms.txt for a cataloged company — a curated, AI-readable guide to the business.

tools.name: check_aeo_record
tools.description: Check any domain (cataloged or not) for a v=AEO1 DNS record at _aeo.<domain> — the open standard (aeorecord.org) declaring whether a verified fact record exists and at what trust tier. Verifies the Ed25519 sig= against the live catalog content when present.

tools.name: search_catalog
tools.description: Search the Grounded AEO catalog by company name or domain. Returns up to 10 matches with tier and verification state.

tools.name: run_audit
tools.description: Audit AND FIX a site for AI citation + SEO. Crawls the domain, scores AI-readability 0-10, checks for a v=AEO1 record, and returns the material needed to FIX it: `seoReport.headSnippet` is ready-to-paste <head> markup (title, meta description, Organization JSON-LD) and `setup_prompt` is a step-by-st

tools.name: generate_free_record
tools.description: FINAL STEP of making a site AI-citable: generate a free, self-declared v=AEO1 DNS record and .well-known/aeo.json the user publishes on their own domain, so AI engines can verify the facts came from the owner rather than a scrape. Returns the exact TXT record and JSON file with publishing instructio
